repair_candidate.summary: Finalize contributor PR #88681 by repairing/refeshing its branch if needed, running the required merge-preflight validation and Codex /review, addressing any findings, and preserving @alexzhu0's authorship. Do not close #87327 from this PR because it covers only Ask #1.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Finalize runtime plugin startup stall diagnostics from #88681
repair_candidate.pr_body: Finalize source PR #88681 by @alexzhu0 for #87327 Ask #1. The repair path should refresh the contributor branch if needed, run focused runtime-plugin/cron diagnostics tests, run pnpm check:changed, run Codex /review, address any findings, and preserve source PR attribution. This must not close #87327 because the PR intentionally covers only named in-flight plugin diagnostics; remaining asks stay on the canonical issue.
validation_commands: pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/service/execution-errors.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts src/plugins/loader.test.ts
